company.name: BeautifulMind Consultants
company.tagline: Transforming mental health through culturally grounded solutions
company.description: A Kenyan mental health social enterprise dedicated to providing culturally appropriate psychological services, training, and consultation. BeautifulMind integrates traditional African wisdom with evidence-based psychological practices to deliver holistic mental health solutions.

coFounders.name: Dr. Stephen Asatsa
coFounders.title: Co-founder & Clinical Director
coFounders.role: Strategic leadership, clinical oversight, research integration
coFounders.expertise: Cultural psychology, clinical practice, indigenous knowledge systems

coFounders.name: Co-founder Partner
coFounders.title: Co-founder & Operations Director
coFounders.role: Business operations, program management, client relations
coFounders.expertise: Business management, program coordination, community engagement

services.title: Clinical Psychological Services
services.description: Individual and group counseling using culturally adapted therapeutic approaches
services.approach: Integration of Western therapeutic techniques with African cultural practices

services.title: Corporate Training and Consultation
services.description: Workplace mental health programs and organizational development
services.approach: Evidence-based organizational psychology with cultural sensitivity

services.title: Community Mental Health Programs
services.description: Community-based mental health initiatives and capacity building
services.approach: Community participatory methods and culturally appropriate interventions

services.title: Research and Academic Consultation
services.description: Research support and academic consultation services
services.approach: Rigorous research methodology with cultural relevance

coreValues.title: Cultural Authenticity
coreValues.description: Honoring and integrating African cultural wisdom into psychological practice

coreValues.title: Scientific Rigor
coreValues.description: Maintaining evidence-based standards in all interventions

coreValues.title: Community Impact
coreValues.description: Ensuring services translate into tangible community benefits

coreValues.title: Accessibility
coreValues.description: Making quality mental health services available to all who need them

philosophy.approach: Blending traditional African healing wisdom with modern psychological science
philosophy.vision: To become Africa's leading provider of culturally grounded mental health services

achievements.title: Mental Health Innovation Award
achievements.description: Recognition for innovative approaches to community mental health

achievements.title: Social Enterprise Excellence
achievements.description: Acknowledgment for sustainable business model in mental health
